---
title: "01_Longitudinal Dataset"
author: "kim soyeon"
date: "2026-05-26"
output: html_document
---



```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

  
# 데이터셋


```{r}
# ============================================================
#  curatedMetagenomicData: DIABIMMUNE + IBDMDB 데이터 접근 및 탐색
#  - KosticAD_2015  (DIABIMMUNE / T1D 영아 종단)
#  - LloydPrice_2019 (IBDMDB / IBD 종단 multi-omics)
#
# ============================================================



if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

pkgs <- c(
  "curatedMetagenomicData",  # 메인 데이터 패키지
  "SummarizedExperiment",    # SE 객체 조작
  "TreeSummarizedExperiment",
  "dplyr",                   # 데이터 조작
  "ggplot2",                 # 시각화
  "vegan",                   # 다양성 분석 (alpha/beta)
  "pheatmap",                # 히트맵
  "patchwork"                # 플롯 조합
)

invisible(lapply(pkgs, function(p) {
  if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE))
   BiocManager::install(p, ask = FALSE)
  library(p, character.only = TRUE)
}))

```


```{r}

# ============================================================
#  SECTION 1 : 사용 가능한 데이터셋 목록 확인
# ============================================================

# cMD에서 제공하는 전체 study 목록 미리보기
all_studies <- sampleMetadata |>
  dplyr::distinct(study_name) |>
  dplyr::pull(study_name)

message("cMD에 수록된 전체 study 수: ", length(all_studies)) # 93

# 우리가 관심 있는 두 study 확인
target_studies <- c("KosticAD_2015", "LloydPrice_2019")
cat("\n관심 study 존재 여부:\n")
print(target_studies %in% all_studies) # true, false 

# 두 study의 sample 수 미리 확인
sampleMetadata |>
  dplyr::filter(study_name %in% target_studies) |>
  dplyr::count(study_name, name = "n_samples") |>
  print() # 120
```


```{r}

# ============================================================
#  SECTION 2 : DIABIMMUNE — KosticAD_2015 데이터 로드
# ============================================================

# 사용 가능한 resource 타입 먼저 확인 (dryrun = TRUE)
curatedMetagenomicData("KosticAD_2015", dryrun = TRUE)
# 2021-03-31.KosticAD_2015.gene_families
# 2021-03-31.KosticAD_2015.marker_abundance
# 2021-03-31.KosticAD_2015.marker_presence
# 2021-03-31.KosticAD_2015.pathway_abundance
# 2021-03-31.KosticAD_2015.pathway_coverage
# 2021-03-31.KosticAD_2015.relative_abundance

# relative_abundance 데이터 로드 (TreeSummarizedExperiment)
kostic_tse <- curatedMetagenomicData(
  "KosticAD_2015.relative_abundance",
  dryrun  = FALSE,
  counts  = FALSE   # 상대 풍부도 그대로 반환
)[[1]]


# ── 2-1. 기본 구조 확인 ────────────────────────────────────
print(kostic_tse)

cat("\n--- Dimensions ---\n")
cat("  Features (taxa) :", nrow(kostic_tse), "\n") # 330
cat("  Samples         :", ncol(kostic_tse), "\n") # 120

# ── 2-2. 메타데이터 탐색 ───────────────────────────────────
cat("\n--- Column (sample) metadata 컬럼 목록 ---\n")
meta_k <- as.data.frame(colData(kostic_tse))
print(names(meta_k))
#  [1] "study_name"                 "subject_id"                 "body_site"                 
#  [4] "study_condition"            "disease"                    "age"                       
#  [7] "infant_age"                 "age_category"               "gender"                    
# [10] "country"                    "non_westernized"            "sequencing_platform"       
# [13] "DNA_extraction_kit"         "PMID"                       "number_reads"              
# [16] "number_bases"               "minimum_read_length"        "median_read_length"        
# [19] "NCBI_accession"             "curator"                    "days_from_first_collection"
# [22] "born_method"                "feeding_practice"           "disease_subtype"           
# [25] "HLA"                        "autoantibody_positive"      "age_seroconversion"        
# [28] "age_T1D_diagnosis"         

meta_k$subject_id %>% unique %>% length # 19

meta_k  %>% 
  group_by(subject_id) %>% 
  summarise(Count = n())
#    subject_id Count
#    <chr>      <int>
#  1 E001463        6
#  2 E003251        5
#  3 E003989        7
#  4 E006547        5
#  5 E006574       10
#  6 E006673        4
#  7 E010590        9
#  8 E010629        3
#  9 E010937        9
# 10 E016924        6
# 11 E017751        7
# 12 E018113        8
# 13 E018268        7
# 14 E022137        5
# 15 E022852        4
# 16 E026079        4
# 17 T013815        8
# 18 T014292        6
# 19 T025418        7

# 핵심 종단 변수 확인



cat("\n--- 주요 임상 변수 분포 ---\n")
cat("\n[study_condition]\n")
print(table(meta_k$study_condition, useNA = "always"))
# control     T1D    <NA> 
#      89      31       0 
cat("\n[age_category]\n")
print(table(meta_k$age_category, useNA = "always"))
  # child newborn    <NA> 
  #    95      25       0 
# age 분포 (months)
cat("\n[age_months summary]\n")
print(summary(meta_k$age))

# subject 수 (종단 구조 확인)
if ("subject_id" %in% names(meta_k)) {
  n_subj <- dplyr::n_distinct(meta_k$subject_id)
  cat("\n고유 subject 수:", n_subj,
      "/ 총 샘플:", ncol(kostic_tse),
      "→ 평균 time points per subject:",
      round(ncol(kostic_tse) / n_subj, 1), "\n")
}
# 고유 subject 수: 19 / 총 샘플: 120 → 평균 time points per subject: 6.3 



```



# 분석 예시 
```{r}
# ── 2-3. Taxonomy 구조 확인 ────────────────────────────────
cat("\n--- Taxonomy ranks 포함 여부 ---\n")
if (!is.null(rowData(kostic_tse))) {
  print(names(rowData(kostic_tse)))
}

# 상위 20 taxa (평균 상대풍부도 기준)
top20_kostic <- rowMeans(assay(kostic_tse, "relative_abundance"), na.rm = TRUE) |>
  sort(decreasing = TRUE) |>
  head(20)

cat("\n--- Top 20 taxa (평균 relative abundance) ---\n")
print(round(top20_kostic * 100, 3))


# ── 2-4. Alpha 다양성 계산 ─────────────────────────────────
ra_k <- assay(kostic_tse, "relative_abundance")
ra_k[is.na(ra_k)] <- 0

# Shannon diversity
shannon_k <- vegan::diversity(t(ra_k), index = "shannon")
meta_k$shannon <- shannon_k[colnames(kostic_tse)]

cat("\n--- Shannon diversity (by condition) ---\n")
meta_k |>
  dplyr::group_by(study_condition) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_shannon = round(mean(shannon, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    sd_shannon   = round(sd(shannon, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    n            = dplyr::n()
  ) |>
  print()

# ── 2-5. 시각화 ────────────────────────────────────────────
# (A) Shannon diversity over time, by T1D status
if ("age" %in% names(meta_k) && "study_condition" %in% names(meta_k)) {
  p_shannon_time <- meta_k |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(age), !is.na(study_condition)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = age, y = shannon,
               color = study_condition, group = study_condition)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 1.2) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("control" = "#1D9E75", "T1D" = "#D85A30"),
      labels = c("control" = "대조군", "T1D" = "T1D 발병군")
    ) +
    labs(
      title    = "DIABIMMUNE: Shannon Diversity over Time",
      subtitle = "KosticAD_2015 | T1D vs Control (longitudinal)",
      x        = "Age (months)",
      y        = "Shannon Diversity",
      color    = "Group"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  print(p_shannon_time)
}

p_shannon_time
```


```{r}
# (B) Top taxa boxplot (T1D vs Control)
top5_names <- names(top20_kostic)[1:5]
top5_df_k <- as.data.frame(t(ra_k[top5_names, , drop = FALSE])) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("sample_id") |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    tibble::rownames_to_column(meta_k, "sample_id"),
    by = "sample_id"
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols      = dplyr::all_of(top5_names),
    names_to  = "taxon",
    values_to = "rel_abund"
  )

p_top5_k <- ggplot(top5_df_k,
                   aes(x = study_condition, y = rel_abund + 1e-5,
                       fill = study_condition)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ taxon, scales = "free_y", ncol = 5) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("control" = "#1D9E75", "T1D" = "#D85A30")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "DIABIMMUNE: Top 5 Taxa — T1D vs Control",
    subtitle = "KosticAD_2015 | log10 relative abundance",
    x = "", y = "Relative abundance (log10)", fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 7))

print(p_top5_k)

```


```{r}
#

# ============================================================
#  SECTION 5 : Beta 다양성 (Bray-Curtis PCoA)
# ============================================================

# KosticAD_2015 PCoA
bc_k  <- vegan::vegdist(t(ra_k), method = "bray")
pcoa_k <- cmdscale(bc_k, k = 2, eig = TRUE)
var_k  <- round(pcoa_k$eig[1:2] / sum(pcoa_k$eig[pcoa_k$eig > 0]) * 100, 1)

pcoa_df_k <- data.frame(
  PC1       = pcoa_k$points[, 1],
  PC2       = pcoa_k$points[, 2],
  condition = meta_k$study_condition[match(rownames(pcoa_k$points),
                                           rownames(meta_k))]
) |> dplyr::filter(!is.na(condition))

p_pcoa_k <- ggplot(pcoa_df_k, aes(PC1, PC2, color = condition)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.8) +
  stat_ellipse(linewidth = 0.8, type = "t") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("control" = "#1D9E75", "T1D" = "#D85A30"),
    labels = c("control" = "대조군", "T1D" = "T1D")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "DIABIMMUNE: Bray-Curtis PCoA",
    subtitle = "KosticAD_2015",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", var_k[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", var_k[2], "%)"),
    color = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


# 두 PCoA 나란히 출력
print(p_pcoa_k)

```


```{r}
# ============================================================
#  SECTION 6 : PERMANOVA (그룹 간 차이 유의성 검정)
# ============================================================

cat("\n=== PERMANOVA (Bray-Curtis) 결과 ===\n")

# KosticAD_2015
bc_k_mat  <- as.matrix(bc_k)
keep_k    <- rownames(bc_k_mat)[!is.na(meta_k$study_condition)]
perm_k    <- vegan::adonis2(
  bc_k_mat[keep_k, keep_k] ~ study_condition,
  data    = meta_k[keep_k, ],
  permutations = 999
)
cat("\n[KosticAD_2015] T1D vs Control:\n")
print(perm_k)
# 
# 
# # ============================================================
# #  SECTION 7 : 데이터 내보내기 (TSV)
# # ============================================================
# 
# out_dir <- "cMD_output"
# if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir)
# 
# # Relative abundance matrices
# write.table(
#   as.data.frame(assay(kostic_tse, "relative_abundance")),
#   file = file.path(out_dir, "KosticAD_2015_relabund.tsv"),
#   sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, col.names = NA
# )
# write.table(
#   as.data.frame(colData(kostic_tse)),
#   file = file.path(out_dir, "KosticAD_2015_metadata.tsv"),
#   sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, col.names = NA
# )

```
